response.justification: Bogdan possesses a highly relevant technical background for the Engineering Productivity domain, including extensive hands-on experience building testing frameworks, CI/CD pipelines, and developer tools. However, this is a Level II Engineering Manager role requiring at least two years of formal people management. His resume outlines a purely individual contributor and technical leadership trajectory (Staff Engineer, Founder) with no evidence of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, or driving organizational change, making him unsuitable for this specific management position.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience, easily surpassing the 8-year minimum requirement.
Deep expertise in developer tools and testing infrastructure, evidenced by his work on CI/CD pipelines, test runners (Trial), and TDD libraries.
Practical experience with mobile platforms, including iOS app development and mobile device orchestration tools.
concerns: Zero documented experience in formal people management, 1-on-1s, or performance evaluations.
Lacks experience setting strategic roadmaps or driving organizational change at a management level.
Does not hold the preferred Master's or PhD degree.
